details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest hardcover picture book ages 3–5 under $20 (qty 2) to cart
Task 2: Create parent account and set reading preferences for two children
Task 3: Add up to three recent high-rated bedtime story eBooks under $10 to wishlist
Task 4: Add cheaper qualifying paperback vs hardcover edition of first book in first series to cart
Task 5: Add Grade 2 classroom pack (>=20 copies, <=$150) and select standard shipping
Task 6: Register for free virtual event for ages 8–10 in October
Task 7: Open recent Grade 4 fantasy reading guide PDF
Task 8: Write 5-star review (>=50 chars) for most recent purchased book
Task 9: Subscribe to newsletters for New Releases 3–5 and Sales only
